zh.lifeSummary: Mary Margery Davenport於1375年出生在英國英格蘭爾伊頓 白 從萊頓。她於1389年與William Mainwaring II在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1419年在英國英格蘭爾奧維 奧福享年44歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭爾馬爾斯頓聖 包利斯 邱奇。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mary Margery Davenport于1375年出生在英国英格兰爾伊頓 白 從萊頓。她于1389年与William Mainwaring II在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福聖 勞倫也斯 邱奇结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。她去世于1419年在英国英格兰爾奧維 奧福享年44岁，埋葬在英国英格兰爾馬爾斯頓聖 包利斯 邱奇。

nameMeanings.name: Davenport
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Lancashire and Cheshire): habitational name from a place in Cheshire named Davenport, from the Dane river (apparently named with a Celtic cognate of Middle Welsh dafnu ‘to drop, to trickle’) + Old English port ‘market town’.

Irish: in Tipperary, this is an English surname adopted by bearers of Munster Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh ‘descendant of Donndubhartach’, a personal name composed of the elements donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’ + dubh ‘black’ + artach ‘nobleman’.
History: John Davenport (died 1670) arrived in Boston, MA, in 1637. He came of an English Cheshire family associated with Capesthorne Hall, near Macclesfield.

variants.name: Devenport
meanings: English and Irish (Lancashire): variant of Davenport . The spelling Devonport is found in Ireland and it may have been this form which gave rise to Devenport.

variants.name: Dunworth
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Eamon, Niall.
Irish: adopted in Ireland by bearers of Gaelic Ó Donndubhartaigh (see Davenport 2).
English: perhaps a variant of Dungworth, see Dunsworth .

nameMeanings.name: Mary
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From Latin Maria via Old Welsh Meir. See Mary .

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

en.lifeSummary: Mary Margery Davenport was born in 1375, in Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. She married William Mainwaring II in 1389, in St Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1419, in Over Peover, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 44, and was buried in St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Mary Margery Davenport est née en 1375, à Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Elle a épousé William Mainwaring II en 1389, à St Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1419, à Over Peover, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 44 ans, et a été enterrée à St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

it.lifeSummary: Mary Margery Davenport è nata il nel 1375 nel Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Lei sposato William Mainwaring II nel 1389, nel St Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Cheshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. ja.lifeSummary: Mary Margery Davenportは1375年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアエアトン ビー コングレトンで生まれた。1389年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバースト ラウレンセ'ス チャーチでWilliam Mainwaring IIと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼女は1419年にイギリスイギリスチェシュアイアオバー ペオバーで44歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスチェシュアイアマーストンスト プアウル'ス チャーチにて埋葬された。

ko.Saint James' and Saint Paul's Church, Ma: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마스턴 스트 폴'스 c후르치

ko.Saint Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Ch: 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버 스트 로렌스'스 c후르치
ko.lifeSummary: Mary Margery Davenport(은)는 1375년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 이턴 비 콘글레턴에서 태어났다. 그녀는 1389년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버 스트 로렌스'스 c후르치에서 William Mainwaring II(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1419년 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 버 p오버에서 44세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 체실르 마스턴 스트 폴'스 c후르치에 묻혔다.

ru.Saint Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Ch: ст ларенсе'с чурч, овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Mary Margery Davenport родилась в 1375 г. в местности эатон би конглетон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Mainwaring II в 1389 г. в местности ст ларенсе'с чурч, овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1419 г. в местности овир пеовир, чешир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 44 лет и была похоронена в местности ст поул'с чурч, марстон, чешир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Mary Margery Davenport nació en 1375, en Eaton by Congleton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Se casó con William Mainwaring II en 1389, en St Lawrence's Church, Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió en 1419, en Over Peover, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 44 años, y fue sepultada en St Paul's Church, Marston, Cheshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
